nasb.text: When he got to the stairs, he was carried by the soldiers because of the violence of the mob;

esv.text: And when he came to the steps, he was actually carried by the soldiers because of the violence of the crowd,

cnv.text: 保羅到了臺階下面的時候，士兵把他抬起來，因為群眾猛擠，

ccb.text: 保罗刚走上台阶，众人便凶猛地拥挤过来，士兵们只好把他举起来抬着走。

csbs.text: 保罗到了台阶上的时候，由于人群凶猛，士兵们只好把他抬起来走。
